name: Reversi
author: AGP
description: Reversi (Othello), the flipping game. Place a disc so it brackets a straight line of opponent discs between the new disc and another of your own; every bracketed disc flips to your colour. Pass only when you cannot move. When neither player can move, the majority of discs wins; equal counts draw. Black moves first. Options: board size (8×8, or 10×10 Grand Othello); opening (the modern Othello fixed diagonal start, or the original Reversi open centre where players place the first four discs into the central squares with no captures); and goal (standard most-discs, or Anti-/misère Othello where FEWER discs wins).
